label: Reliability
items: Marking a task complete now feels instant — the tick lands locally before the round-trip to the server.
If you mark a task complete while offline, it's queued locally and synced automatically the moment you're back online. A 'queued' chip in the header shows how many actions are waiting.

items.text: Out and about in the garden with patchy signal? Just keep ticking things off — Rhozly will catch up later.
